transcript: We've got a bit of, I mean, we don't really have much in the way of defenses yet, and we can make it happen here. Are we safe up here? Well, they will get us up there in a bit. As far, as long as I play, they don't know how to climb ropes. They can climb trees, but they can't climb ropes. Um, and if you make, like, bow and arrows, then you can take them off from up there, like the dummies. Can we just throw Molotovs at them and, like, it'll crowd on fire? That's a better idea, Nick.

timestamps.text: We've got a bit of, I mean, we don't really have much in the way of defenses yet, and we can make it happen here.
Well, they will get us up there in a bit. As far, as long as I play, they don't know how to climb ropes.
They can climb trees, but they can't climb ropes.
Um, and if you make, like, bow and arrows, then you can take them off from up there, like the dummies.
Can we just throw Molotovs at them and, like, it'll crowd on fire?
